entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Tetraploid groundnut (Arachis hypogaea L.), the target crop for the genetic map

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A type of mapping population used to develop genetic maps

entities.name: BACKCROSS POPULATION
entities.description: A type of mapping population used to develop genetic maps

entities.name: MARKER DENSITY
entities.description: The number of markers per unit of map distance

entities.name: GENOME SIZE
entities.description: The total amount of DNA in a haploid genome, 2800 Mb/1C for tetraploid groundnut

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of markers that are inherited together, 20 in total for tetraploid groundnut

entities.name: REFERENCE CONSENSUS GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A unified genetic map developed from 10 RILs and one BC population, containing 897 marker loci

entities.name: MARKER LOCI
entities.description: Specific positions on a chromosome, 897 in total in the reference consensus map

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of molecular marker, with 895 loci in the reference consensus map

entities.name: CLEAVED AMPLIFIED POLYMORPHIC SEQUENCE
entities.description: A type of molecular marker, with 2 loci in the reference consensus map

entities.name: MAP DISTANCE
entities.description: The total distance of the reference consensus map, spanning 3,863.6 cM

entities.name: BINS
entities.description: 203 segments of the reference consensus map, each 20 cM long

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A measure of the informativeness of a genetic marker, available for 526 markers in 190 BINs

entities.name: BACKGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: A process to remove unwanted genetic material from a breeding line

entities.name: DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of genetic variation within a population
